---
title: "Emily Sophia Doyne"
---

## Emily Sophia Doyne

**Dates:** b. 1829/30

### Description

wife of the Rev. Philip Walter Doyne (d. 1862), Vicar of Barrow Gurney.  She was staying with Matilda Blanche Gibbs in London at the time of the 1881 census.  She seems to have lived at Wraxall Cottage near Tyntesfield, and was evidently a friend of Frances Mary Peard\'s.

### Letters

- Letter from July 23, 1873

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
